guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"79cfu","text":"Notes:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8kntp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8i9va","text":"Solution is acidic and should be handled with care.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"42o","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3p7ti","text":" Discard solution if a cloudy precipitate forms. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eq1g2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5q69n","text":" For use on board ship, it is best to pre-weigh iron chloride into 50ml centrifuge tubes and add water as needed during the cruise: pre-weigh 0.966g FeCl3·6H2O into several 50ml tubes.
